name: Apricot Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, melted butter, cinnamon, and 1/8 teaspoon nutmeg in a small bowl.
2. Press the mixture onto the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 7 to 10 minutes until lightly browned.
4. Meanwhile, combine cottage cheese and reduced calorie cream cheese, eggs, dates, 1/3 cup pineapple juice, vanilla extract, grated orange rind, and remaining nutmeg in a food processor or blender.
5. Blend until well mixed.
6. Pour the mixture into the cooled crust.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes until the filling is set.
8. Chill at least one hour.
9. Combine remaining pineapple juice and cornstarch in a small saucepan.
10. Heat to boiling, then boil 1 minute, stirring constantly, until thickened and clear.
11. Arrange drained apricot halves on top of the cheese filling.
12. Spoon the pineapple glaze evenly over the apricots.
13. Refrigerate until the glaze is set.
